title: Acianthera phyllostachys
taxonomy: Acianthera phyllostachys is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. Specifically, it is a member of the genus Acianthera, which is a group of small to medium-sized epiphytic orchids. The genus Acianthera is part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which includes over 1,000 species of orchids. Acianthera phyllostachys is native to Central and South America, where it grows in humid, shaded environments. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other orchid species.
